productDisplayName: Latin Quarters Women White Printed Top
description: Style Note This super soft white and maroon top, is the season's summer essential. latin quarters can be relied upon to offer a whole collection of style, and they don't disappoint with this cute top. Style this with your favourite jeans and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe. Product Details White and maroon floral printed top that has a round neck and short sleeves Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Line dry Warm iron on reverse; do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8” and chest 33”) is wearing a size M
